Deciphering the World of Science – Deciphering the World of Science (DTWS) is a student-led global education initiative that teaches advanced molecular biology and genomics while training students to become instructors and establish independent chapters within their own communities. DTWS operates on the principle that students should not merely consume scientific knowledge, but actively propagate it. By transforming learners into educators, DTWS creates a self-sustaining global network of student scientists capable of expanding access to advanced biological education.
